output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>

struct NetworkPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string username;
    std::vector<uint32_t> scores;
    std::string metadata;
    
    void serialise(auto& stream) {
        stream << packet_id;
        stream << hexi::prefixed(username);
        stream << hexi::prefixed(scores);
        stream << hexi::null_terminated(metadata);
    }
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_packet(const NetworkPacket& packet) {
    hexi::memory_buffer buffer;
    hexi::stream stream(buffer);
    packet.serialise(stream);
    return std::vector<uint8_t>(buffer.data(), buffer.data() + buffer.size());
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct NetworkPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string username;
    std::vector<uint32_t> scores;
    std::string metadata;
};

NetworkPacket deserialize_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    size_t offset = 0;
    
    // Read packet_id
    auto packet_id = hexi::read<uint32_t>(buffer.data(), offset);
    offset += sizeof(uint32_t);
    
    // Read username (length-prefixed)
    auto username = hexi::prefixed<std::string>(buffer, offset);
    offset += sizeof(uint32_t) + username.length();
    
    // Read scores count
    auto scores_count = hexi::read<uint32_t>(buffer.data(), offset);
    offset += sizeof(uint32_t);
    
    // Read scores vector
    std::vector<uint32_t> scores(scores_count);
    hexi::read_vec(buffer.data(), offset, scores_count, scores);
    offset += scores_count * sizeof(uint32_t);
    
    // Read metadata (null-terminated)
    auto metadata = hexi::null_terminated<std::string>(buffer, offset);
    offset += metadata.length() + 1; // +1 for null terminator
    
    NetworkPacket packet;
    packet.packet_id = packet_id;
    packet.username = std::move(username);
    packet.scores = std::move(scores);
    packet.metadata = std::move(metadata);
    
    return packet;
}

struct PacketInfo {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string_view username;
};

PacketInfo extract_packet_info(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    size_t offset = 0;
    
    // Use span() for packet_id
    auto packet_id_span = hexi::span_adaptor<uint32_t>(buffer, offset);
    uint32_t packet_id = *packet_id_span;
    offset += sizeof(uint32_t);
    
    // Read username using prefixed adaptor to get string_view
    auto username = hexi::prefixed<std::string_view>(buffer, offset);
    offset += sizeof(uint32_t) + username.length();
    
    // Read scores count and skip the data
    auto scores_count = hexi::read<uint32_t>(buffer.data(), offset);
    offset += sizeof(uint32_t);
    offset += scores_count * sizeof(uint32_t); // Skip scores data
    
    // Read metadata as null-terminated string_view
    auto metadata = hexi::null_terminated<std::string_view>(buffer, offset);
    offset += metadata.length() + 1; // +1 for null terminator
    
    PacketInfo info;
    info.packet_id = packet_id;
    info.username = username;
    
    return info;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct MessageHeader {
    uint16_t message_type;
    uint32_t body_length;
    uint32_t footer;
};

MessageHeader read_header_and_skip_body(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::Stream stream(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    MessageHeader header;
    header.message_type = stream.read<uint16_t>();
    header.body_length = stream.read<uint32_t>();
    stream.skip(header.body_length);
    header.footer = stream.read<uint32_t>();
    return header;
}
```</answer>

        if (data[i] == 0) {
            return std::string_view(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(data), i);
        }
    }
    return std::string_view(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(data), length);
}

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>
#include <stdexcept>

struct DataResult {
    uint8_t data_type;
    std::vector<uint32_t> int_items;
    std::vector<float> float_items;
};

DataResult preview_and_read_data(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);
    
    // Preview data_type without advancing the read pointer
    uint8_t data_type;
    stream.peek(data_type);
    
    // Read item_count
    uint32_t item_count;
    stream.read(item_count);
    
    // Check if buffer has sufficient data
    size_t required_size = 5 + item_count * 4; // 1 byte data_type + 4 bytes item_count + items
    if (buffer.size() < required_size) {
        throw std::runtime_error("Insufficient buffer size");
    }
    
    // Read items based on data_type
    if (data_type == 0) { // Integers
        for (uint32_t i = 0; i < item_count; ++i) {
            uint32_t value;
            stream.read(value);
            DataResult::int_items.push_back(value);
        }
    } else if (data_type == 1) { // Floats
        for (uint32_t i = 0; i < item_count; ++i) {
            float value;
            stream.read(value);
            DataResult::float_items.push_back(value);
        }
    } else {
        throw std::runtime_error("Invalid data type identifier");
    }
    
    return DataResult{data_type, DataResult::int_items, DataResult::float_items};
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

bool write_data_with_check(std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer, uint32_t header, const std::vector<uint32_t>& items) {
    // Calculate required space: header (4 bytes) + items (each 4 bytes)
    size_t required_space = sizeof(uint32_t) + items.size() * sizeof(uint32_t);
    
    // Create buffer adaptor with current buffer state
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer.data(), buffer.size(), buffer.capacity());
    
    // Check if sufficient space is available
    if (adaptor.available() < required_space) {
        return false;
    }
    
    // Create binary stream for writing
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor, hexi::stream_mode::write);
    
    // Write header and items container
    stream.write(header);
    stream.write_container(items);
    
    return true;
}
```</answer>

PacketHeader read_header_with_span(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);
    
    PacketHeader header;
    stream >> header.magic >> header.version >> header.flags;
    
    return header;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <string>

struct UserData {
    uint32_t user_id;
    std::string name;
    
    void serialise(auto& adaptor) {
        adaptor(user_id, name);
    }
};

std::vector<uint8_t> write_and_serialise_packet(uint32_t header, const UserData& data) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> packet;
    
    // Write header as raw bytes
    const uint8_t* header_bytes = reinterpret_cast<const uint8_t*>(&header);
    packet.insert(packet.end(), header_bytes, header_bytes + sizeof(header));
    
    // Serialize UserData using Hexi's serialization
    hexi::allocators::vector_allocator<uint8_t> allocator;
    hexi::serialization::adaptor adaptor(allocator);
    data.serialise(adaptor);
    
    // Append serialized UserData to the packet
    packet.insert(packet.end(), allocator.get_data().begin(), allocator.get_data().end());
    
    return packet;
}
```</answer>

std::vector<uint8_t> preview_data_without_consuming(const hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage, size_t bytes_to_preview) {

    size_t remaining = bytes_to_copy;

    }

        size_t offset_in_block = current_offset % block_size;
        size_t available_in_block = block_size - offset_in_block;
        size_t copy_from_block = std::min(available_in_block, remaining);

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/detail/intrusive_storage.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <algorithm>

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> preview_data_without_consuming(const hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage, size_t bytes_to_preview) {
    size_t readable_bytes = storage.write_offset - storage.read_offset;
    size_t bytes_to_copy = std::min(bytes_to_preview, readable_bytes);
    if (bytes_to_copy == 0) {
        return {};
    }
    
    std::vector<uint8_t> result;
    result.reserve(bytes_to_copy);
    
    size_t current_offset = storage.read_offset;
    size_t remaining = bytes_to_copy;
    const auto* current_block = storage.get_head(); // Assuming get_head() is available
    
    // Traverse to the correct starting block
    size_t block_index = current_offset / block_size;
    for (size_t i = 0; i < block_index && current_block != nullptr; ++i) {
        current_block = current_block->next;
    }
    
    while (remaining > 0 && current_block != nullptr) {
        size_t offset_in_block = current_offset % block_size;
        size_t available_in_block = block_size - offset_in_block;
        size_t copy_from_block = std::min(available_in_block, remaining);
        
        // Copy data from current block
        const uint8_t* data = current_block->data + offset_in_block;
        result.insert(result.end(), data, data + copy_from_block);
        
        remaining -= copy_from_block;
        current_offset += copy_from_block;
        current_block = current_block->next;
    }
    
    return result;
}

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
struct BufferStatus {
    size_t readable_size;
    size_t free_space;
};

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
BufferStatus<> check_buffer_status(const hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage) {
    BufferStatus status;
    status.readable_size = storage.write_offset - storage.read_offset;
    status.free_space = block_size - (storage.write_offset % block_size);
    return status;
}

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
void reset_buffer(hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage) {
    storage.read_offset = 0;
    storage.write_offset = 0;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/file_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <filesystem>

std::vector<uint8_t> read_file_data(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, size_t bytes_to_read) {
    hexi::file_buffer file(file_path, "rb");
    std::vector<uint8_t> data(bytes_to_read);
    size_t bytes_read = file.read(data.data(), bytes_to_read);
    data.resize(bytes_read);
    return data;
}

std::vector<uint8_t> preview_file_data(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, size_t bytes_to_preview) {
    hexi::file_buffer file(file_path, "rb");
    size_t current_pos = file.tell();
    std::vector<uint8_t> data(bytes_to_preview);
    size_t bytes_read = file.read(data.data(), bytes_to_preview);
    data.resize(bytes_read);
    file.seek(current_pos);
    return data;
}

void write_file_data(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, const std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    hexi::file_buffer file(file_path, "wb");
    file.write(data.data(), data.size());
}

size_t get_file_size(const std::filesystem::path& file_path) {
    hexi::file_buffer file(file_path, "rb");
    return file.size();
}

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/file_buffer.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <filesystem>

uint32_t read_uint32_from_file(const std::filesystem::path& file_path) {
    hexi::file_buffer file(file_path, hexi::buffer_mode::read);
    uint32_t value;
    file.read(&value, sizeof(value));
    return value;
}

void write_uint32_to_file(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, uint32_t value) {
    hexi::file_buffer file(file_path, hexi::buffer_mode::write);
    file.write(&value, sizeof(value));
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/file_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <filesystem>
#include <stdexcept>

std::vector<uint8_t> preview_file_header(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, size_t header_size) {
    hexi::file_buffer file;
    file.open(file_path, hexi::file_buffer::in);
    
    if (!file.is_open()) {
        throw std::runtime_error("Cannot open file");
    }
    
    auto original_pos = file.tellg();
    
    // Read into a temporary buffer
    std::vector<uint8_t> temp(header_size);
    file.read(reinterpret_cast<char*>(temp.data()), header_size);
    
    // Calculate actual bytes read
    auto current_pos = file.tellg();
    size_t bytes_read = current_pos - original_pos;
    
    // Resize if fewer bytes were read than requested
    if (bytes_read < header_size) {
        temp.resize(bytes_read);
    }
    
    // Restore original position
    file.seekg(original_pos);
    
    return temp;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <algorithm>

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
void write_data_to_buffer(hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer, const std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    for (size_t i = 0; i < std::min(data.size(), buffer_size); ++i) {
        buffer[i] = static_cast<std::byte>(data[i]);
    }
}

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> read_data_from_buffer(hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer, size_t bytes_to_read) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> result;
    size_t bytes_available = std::min(bytes_to_read, buffer_size);
    for (size_t i = 0; i < bytes_available; ++i) {
        result.push_back(static_cast<uint8_t>(buffer[i]));
    }
    return result;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <algorithm>

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> preview_buffer_data(const hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer, size_t bytes_to_preview) {
    size_t bytes_available = buffer.size();
    size_t bytes_to_copy = std::min(bytes_to_preview, bytes_available);
    
    std::vector<uint8_t> result(bytes_to_copy);
    
    const std::byte* data_ptr = buffer.read_ptr();
    for (size_t i = 0; i < bytes_to_copy; ++i) {
        result[i] = static_cast<uint8_t>(data_ptr[i]);
    }
    
    return result;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_reader.h>

}

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_writer.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_reader.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <string>
#include <vector>

void write_string_to_stream(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer& writer, const std::string& str) {
    writer.write_uint32(static_cast<uint32_t>(str.length()));
    writer.write_bytes(str.data(), str.length());
}

std::string read_string_from_stream(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader& reader) {
    uint32_t length = reader.read_uint32();
    std::vector<char> buffer(length);
    reader.read_bytes(buffer.data(), length);
    return std::string(buffer.data(), length);
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_writer.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_reader.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

void write_container_to_stream(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer& writer, const std::vector<uint32_t>& container) {
    writer.write_uint32(static_cast<uint32_t>(container.size()));
    for (const auto& element : container) {
        writer.write_uint32(element);
    }
}

std::vector<uint32_t> read_container_from_stream(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader& reader) {
    uint32_t count = reader.read_uint32();
    std::vector<uint32_t> result;
    result.reserve(count);
    for (uint32_t i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
        result.push_back(reader.read_uint32());
    }
    return result;
}

#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_read.h>

#include <cstdint>

std::size_t find_byte_in_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, std::byte value) {
    for (std::size_t i = 0; i < buffer.size(); ++i) {
        if (buffer.data()[i] == value) {
            return i;
        }
    }
    return hexi::pmc::buffer_read::npos;
}

std::size_t find_delimiter_position(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, std::byte delimiter) {
    for (std::size_t i = 0; i < buffer.size(); ++i) {
        if (buffer.data()[i] == delimiter) {
            return i;
        }
    }
    return hexi::pmc::buffer_read::npos;
}

bool check_buffer_contains(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, std::byte value) {
    return find_byte_in_buffer(buffer, value) != hexi::pmc::buffer_read::npos;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

const void* get_read_pointer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer) {
    return buffer.read_ptr();
}

struct BufferState {
    std::size_t size;
    const void* read_ptr;
    bool is_empty;
};

BufferState get_buffer_state(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer) {
    BufferState state;
    state.size = buffer.size();
    state.read_ptr = buffer.read_ptr();
    state.is_empty = buffer.size() == 0;
    return state;
}
```</answer>

```cpp
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_writer.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_reader.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

using namespace hexi::detail;

template<typename T>
std::size_t encode_varint(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer& writer, T value) {
    uint64_t val = static_cast<uint64_t>(value);
    std::size_t bytes_written = 0;
    while (val > 0x7F) {
        uint8_t byte = (val & 0x7F) | 0x80;
        writer.write_byte(byte);
        val >>= 7;
        bytes_written++;
    }
    uint8_t byte = val & 0x7F;
    writer.write_byte(byte);
    return ++bytes_written;
}

template<typename T>
T decode_varint(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader& reader) {
    uint64_t result = 0;
    int shift = 0;
    uint8_t byte;
    do {
        byte = 0;
        reader.read_byte(&byte, 1);
        result |= static_cast<uint64_t>(byte & 0x7F) << shift;
        shift += 7;
    } while (byte & 0x80);
    return static_cast<T>(result);
}

template<typename T>
bool encode_decode_roundtrip(T original_value) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer writer(adaptor);
    hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader reader(adaptor);
    
    std::size_t bytes_written = encode_varint(writer, original_value);
    reader.seek(0);
    T decoded_value = decode_varint<T>(reader);
    
    return decoded_value == original_value;
}
```

This should handle the varint encoding and decoding using the Hexi library. The functions are templated to work with different integer types, but the actual encoding/decoding is done using unsigned 64-bit arithmetic to handle the bit manipulation correctly.

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <cstring>
#include <cstddef>

using namespace hexi::detail;

bool check_regions_overlap(const void* src, std::size_t src_len, const void* dst, std::size_t dst_len) {
    const char* src_start = static_cast<const char*>(src);
    const char* src_end = src_start + src_len;
    const char* dst_start = static_cast<const char*>(dst);
    const char* dst_end = dst_start + dst_len;
    
    return (src_start < dst_end) && (dst_start < src_end);
}

bool safe_memory_copy(void* destination, const void* source, std::size_t length) {
    if (check_regions_overlap(source, length, destination, length)) {
        std::memmove(destination, source, length);
    } else {
        std::memcpy(destination, source, length);
    }
    return true;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstddef>

struct ExceptionDetails {
    std::size_t read_size;
    std::size_t total_read;
    std::size_t limit_or_size;
    std::string message;
};

ExceptionDetails extract_underrun_info(const hexi::buffer_underrun& e) {
    ExceptionDetails details;
    details.read_size = e.read_size;
    details.total_read = e.total_read;
    details.limit_or_size = e.buff_size;
    details.message = e.what();
    return details;
}

ExceptionDetails extract_read_limit_info(const hexi::stream_read_limit& e) {
    ExceptionDetails details;
    details.read_size = e.read_size;
    details.total_read = e.total_read;
    details.limit_or_size = e.read_limit;
    details.message = e.what();
    return details;
}

std::string get_exception_message(const hexi::exception& e) {
    return e.what();
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>
#include <vector>

struct PaddedData {
    uint16_t header;
    std::string data;
    uint32_t footer;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_with_padding(const PaddedData& packet) {
    hexi::allocators::default_allocator allocator;
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::stream stream(allocator, adaptor);
    
    stream << packet.header;
    stream << static_cast<uint32_t>(packet.data.size());
    stream << packet.data;
    stream.fill<16>(0x00);
    stream << packet.footer;
    
    return buffer;
}

#include <hexi/allocators/block_allocator.h>
#include <vector>
#include <memory>

struct PoolObject {
    int id;
    double value;
    
    // Default constructor required by block_allocator
    PoolObject() : id(0), value(0.0) {}
    
    PoolObject(int i, double v) : id(i), value(v) {}
};

std::vector<PoolObject*> create_object_pool(hexi::block_allocator<PoolObject, 10>& allocator) {
    std::vector<PoolObject*> objects;
    
    // Allocate and construct the first object
    PoolObject* obj1 = allocator.allocate();
    new (obj1) PoolObject(1, 3.14);
    objects.push_back(obj1);
    
    // Allocate and construct the second object
    PoolObject* obj2 = allocator.allocate();
    new (obj2) PoolObject(2, 6.28);
    objects.push_back(obj2);
    
    // Allocate and construct the third object
    PoolObject* obj3 = allocator.allocate();
    new (obj3) PoolObject(3, 9.42);
    objects.push_back(obj3);
    
    return objects;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_base.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstddef>

class CustomBuffer : public hexi::pmc::buffer_base {
    std::vector<std::byte> data_;
    
public:
    virtual std::size_t size() const override {
        return data_.size();
    }
    
    virtual bool empty() const override {
        return data_.empty();
    }
    
    // Helper method to add data (for testing)
    void add_data(const void* source, std::size_t length) {
        const std::byte* bytes = static_cast<const std::byte*>(source);
        data_.insert(data_.end(), bytes, bytes + length);
    }
    
    // Helper method to clear data (for testing)
    void clear() {
        data_.clear();
    }
};
```</answer>

#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_read_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_write_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <algorithm>

std::size_t write_multiple_chunks(const std::vector<std::vector<uint8_t>>& chunks) {
    hexi::pmc::buffer_write_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>> buffer;
    for (const auto& chunk : chunks) {
        // Check available space before writing
        auto available = buffer.free();
        // Write the chunk data
        buffer.write(chunk.data(), chunk.size());
    }
    return buffer.size();
}

std::vector<uint8_t> read_partial_data(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer, std::size_t chunk_size) {
    hexi::pmc::buffer_read_adaptor<const std::vector<uint8_t>> adaptor(buffer);
    std::vector<uint8_t> result;
    std::vector<uint8_t> temp_chunk(chunk_size);
    
    while (adaptor.size() > 0) {
        std::size_t bytes_to_read = std::min(chunk_size, adaptor.size());
        std::size_t bytes_read = adaptor.read(temp_chunk.data(), bytes_to_read);
        result.insert(result.end(), temp_chunk.begin(), temp_chunk.begin() + bytes_read);
    }
    
    return result;
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_read_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

struct Header {
    uint32_t magic;
    uint16_t version;
};

Header peek_header_without_reading(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    hexi::pmc::BufferReadAdaptor adaptor(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    Header header;
    adaptor.copy(&header, sizeof(header));
    return header;
}

std::vector<uint8_t> peek_then_conditionally_read(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    if (buffer.empty()) return {};
    
    hexi::pmc::BufferReadAdaptor adaptor(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    uint8_t first_byte;
    adaptor.copy(&first_byte, 1); // Peek at first byte without consuming
    
    if (first_byte == 0xFF) {
        std::vector<uint8_t> result;
        result.resize(buffer.size() - 1);
        
        // Consume the first byte to advance cursor
        uint8_t temp;
        adaptor.read(&temp, 1);
        
        // Read the remaining data
        adaptor.read(result.data(), result.size());
        return result;
    } else {
        return {}; // Return empty vector if condition not met
    }
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct ProtocolPacket {
    uint32_t message_id;
    std::vector<uint16_t> data_values;
    uint32_t checksum;
};

struct ProtocolHeader {
    uint32_t message_id;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_protocol_packet(const ProtocolPacket& packet) {
    hexi::memory_buffer buffer;
    hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer);
    
    // Convert and write message_id
    uint32_t be_message_id = hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.message_id);
    stream.write(be_message_id);
    
    // Convert and write data_values
    std::vector<uint32_t> be_data_values;
    for (uint16_t val : packet.data_values) {
        be_data_values.push_back(hexi::endian::native_to_big(val));
    }
    stream.write_container(be_data_values);
    
    // Convert and write checksum
    uint32_t be_checksum = hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.checksum);
    stream.write(be_checksum);
    
    return buffer.data();
}

ProtocolPacket deserialize_protocol_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    ProtocolPacket packet;
    
    // Read and convert message_id
    uint32_t be_message_id;
    stream.read(be_message_id);
    packet.message_id = hexi::endian::big_to_native(be_message_id);
    
    // Read data_values count
    uint32_t be_count;
    stream.read(be_count);
    uint32_t count = hexi::endian::big_to_native(be_count);
    
    // Read and convert data_values
    std::vector<uint16_t> data_values;
    data_values.reserve(count);
    for (uint32_t i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
        uint32_t be_val;
        stream.read(be_val);
        data_values.push_back(hexi::endian::big_to_native(be_val));
    }
    packet.data_values = std::move(data_values);
    
    // Read and convert checksum
    uint32_t be_checksum;
    stream.read(be_checksum);
    packet.checksum = hexi::endian::big_to_native(be_checksum);
    
    return packet;
}

ProtocolHeader extract_protocol_header(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    ProtocolHeader header;
    
    // Extract and convert message_id
    auto msg_span = stream.span<uint32_t>(0, 4);
    header.message_id = hexi::endian::big_to_native(*msg_span);
    
    // Skip the header
    stream.skip(4);
    
    return header;
}

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <string>
#include <string_view>

struct MeasurementData {
    uint32_t sensor_id;
    std::vector<float> temperatures;
    double pressure;
    
    void serialise(auto& adaptor) const {
        // Serialize sensor_id directly
        adaptor.write(sensor_id);
        
        // Serialize temperatures with endianness conversion
        for (float temp : temperatures) {
            float converted = hexi::endian::conditional_reverse(
                temp, std::endian::native, std::endian::little, sizeof(float));
            adaptor.write(converted);
        }
        
        // Serialize pressure with endianness conversion
        double converted_pressure = hexi::endian::conditional_reverse(
            pressure, std::endian::native, std::endian::little, sizeof(double));
        adaptor.write(converted_pressure);
    }
    
    void serialise(auto& adaptor) {
        // Deserialize sensor_id directly
        adaptor.read(sensor_id);
        
        // Resize temperatures vector and convert endianness
        temperatures.resize(adaptor.size() / sizeof(float));
        for (auto& temp : temperatures) {
            adaptor.read(temp);
            hexi::endian::little_to_native_inplace(temp);
        }
        
        // Deserialize pressure and convert endianness
        adaptor.read(pressure);
        hexi::endian::little_to_native_inplace(pressure);
    }
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_measurement_data(const MeasurementData& data) {
    hexi::Stream stream;
    data.serialise(stream);
    return stream.buffer();
}

MeasurementData deserialize_measurement_data(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    MeasurementData data;
    hexi::Stream stream(buffer);
    data.serialise(stream);
    return data;
}

struct SensorInfo {
    uint32_t sensor_id;
    std::string_view sensor_name;
};

SensorInfo extract_sensor_info(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::Stream stream(buffer);
    
    // Extract sensor name (assuming null-terminated string at start)
    std::string_view name = stream.view();
    
    // Check if there's enough data for sensor_id
    stream.enforce_read_bounds(sizeof(uint32_t));
    
    // Read sensor_id
    uint32_t id;
    stream.read(id);
    
    // Skip remaining data
    stream.skip(stream.size() - stream.tell());
    
    return {id, name};
}
```

**Explanation:**

1. **Serialization (`serialize_measurement_data`):**
   - Creates a `hexi::Stream` and calls the const `serialise` method on the `MeasurementData` object
   - `sensor_id` is written directly without endianness conversion
   - Each `temperature` is converted from native to little-endian using `conditional_reverse` before writing
   - `pressure` is converted from native to little-endian before writing

2. **Deserialization (`deserialize_measurement_data`):**
   - Creates a `hexi::Stream` from the input buffer
   - Calls the non-const `serialise` method on the `MeasurementData` object
   - `sensor_id` is read directly
   - Each `temperature` is read and converted from little-endian to native using `little_to_native_inplace`
   - `pressure` is read and converted from little-endian to native

3. **Partial Extraction (`extract_sensor_info`):**
   - Uses `view()` to extract a null-terminated sensor name string
   - Checks bounds before reading `sensor_id`
   - Reads `sensor_id` and skips remaining data using `skip()`

The solution handles runtime endianness conversion as specified and uses Hexi's stream interface for binary serialization/deserialization operations.</answer>
